panels.title: Active Routes
panels.description: Routes with an online feature update in the last 10 minutes

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT route_id) AS value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (route_id) route_id, updated_at FROM online_route_features ORDER BY route_id, updated_at DESC) t WHERE updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes'

panels.title: Anomalous Routes Now
panels.description: Latest routes flagged by z-score in the last 10 minutes

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (route_id) route_id, is_anomaly, updated_at FROM online_route_features ORDER BY route_id, updated_at DESC) t WHERE updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes' AND is_anomaly = true

panels.title: Raw to Feature p95
panels.description: p95 full pipeline latency from poll to online features write

targets.rawSql: SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY last_ingest_lag_ms) AS value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (route_id) last_ingest_lag_ms FROM online_route_features WHERE updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes' AND last_ingest_lag_ms IS NOT NULL ORDER BY route_id, updated_at DESC) t

SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.99) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY last_ingest_lag_ms) AS value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (route_id) last_ingest_lag_ms FROM online_route_features WHERE updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes' AND last_ingest_lag_ms IS NOT NULL ORDER BY route_id, updated_at DESC) t

SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY last_ingest_lag_ms) AS value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (route_id) last_ingest_lag_ms FROM online_route_features WHERE updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes' AND last_ingest_lag_ms IS NOT NULL ORDER BY route_id, updated_at DESC) t

panels.title: Total Observations
panels.description: Sum of latest observation_count across all routes

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM(observation_count) AS value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (route_id) observation_count FROM online_route_features ORDER BY route_id, updated_at DESC) t

panels.title: Raw to Feature Latency Over Time
panels.description: p50, p95, p99 of full pipeline latency

targets.rawSql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('minute', updated_at) AS time, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY last_ingest_lag_ms) AS p50_ms, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY last_ingest_lag_ms) AS p95_ms, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.99) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY last_ingest_lag_ms) AS p99_ms FROM online_route_features WHERE $__timeFilter(updated_at) AND last_ingest_lag_ms IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Anomalous Routes Over Time
panels.description: Anomalous and normal route count per minute

targets.rawSql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('minute', updated_at) AS time, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_anomaly = true) AS anomalous, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_anomaly = false) AS normal FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (route_id, DATE_TRUNC('minute', updated_at)) route_id, updated_at, is_anomaly FROM online_route_features WHERE $__timeFilter(updated_at) ORDER BY route_id, DATE_TRUNC('minute', updated_at), updated_at DESC) t GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('minute', scored_at) AS time, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ingest_lag_ms + scoring_ms) AS p50_pipeline_ms, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ingest_lag_ms + scoring_ms) AS p95_pipeline_ms, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY staleness_ms) AS p50_freshness_ms, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY staleness_ms) AS p95_freshness_ms, MAX(scoring_ms) AS scoring_ms FROM prediction_history WHERE $__timeFilter(scored_at) AND ingest_lag_ms IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
